institution.value: - B.R.A.C.T.'s Vishwakarma Institute of Technology, Pune

raw_text:
SHIVAM AHER
 9823591095
 shivamaher101@gmail.com
 LinkedIn
ACADEMIC PROJECTS
Face Emotion Recognition
- To develop an accurate facial expression recognition (FER) system capable of handling real-world variations such as
noise, low resolution, and subtle emotion differences.
- Technology/Languages Used: Deep Learning (ResNet-50), Python, Streamlit
Personal Finance Management System
- To develop a personal finance management system to save daily finances, saving goals, to display illustrated graphs
and charts to the users
- Technology/Languages Used: Python, Django, HTML, CSS, JavaScript
Decentralised Patient Records Management System:
- A secure database-based platform for storing, managing, and verifying student credentials. It improves security and
trust by preventing data tampering and enabling reliable verification through features like hash checking, tamper logs,
and verification records. The system also separates personal and institutional credentials to ensure efficient and
traceable credential management.
- Technology/Languages Used: LangChain, RAG, ReactJS, Docker
TECHNICAL COMPETENCIES
- Languages: Python, C, Java
- Core CS Concepts: Operating Systems, Data Structures and Algorithms, Object Oriented Programming, Computer
Organization and Architecture
- Electronics: Digital Electronics, Microprocessors, Applied Electromechanics
- Web Technologies: HTML, CSS, JavaScript
- Libraries & Frameworks: ReactJS, Django, Scikit-learn, NumPy, Pandas, Matplotlib
EDUCATION
Bachelor of Technology
Nov 2024-Present
- Information Technology
- B.R.A.C.T.'s Vishwakarma Institute of Technology, Pune
- CGPA - 9.07/10 (Up to 4th Semester)
EXTRACURRICULAR ACTIVITIES
Sponsorship Volunteer - Student Council, VIT Pune - First Year
- Assisted the sponsorship team in reaching out to companies for event partnerships
- Supported coordination of sponsorship activities during college events
Marketing and Outreach Volunteer - Entrepreneurship Development Cell, VIT Pune- First Year
- Assisted in promoting EDC events through social media and campus outreach
- Helped increase student participation in entrepreneurship workshops and activities
Sponsorship Co-ordinator - IEEE Student Branch, VIT Pune- Second Year
- Coordinated with event teams to secure sponsorships for technical events
- Assisted in organizing speaker sessions and coding competitions
